name: 4q13_2_UGT2B_cluster
description: 4q13.2 UDP-glucuronosyltransferase 2B (UGT2B) cluster — eight closely linked paralogs (UGT2B4, UGT2B7, UGT2B10, UGT2B11, UGT2B15, UGT2B17, UGT2B28, UGT2A1/2A2) arising from tandem segmental duplications. UGT2B17 is one of the most variable CNVs in humans (common whole-gene deletion in East Asians; population MAF ~0.7 for deletion). Drug-metabolism phenotype consequences.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem array of eight UGT2B paralogs at 90-97% identity, each ~30-40 kb; UGT2B17 whole-gene deletion is a common ~150 kb CNV; UGT2A1/2A2 (5' end) form an additional paralog pair.
